caption: Figure 4 Caulimoviridae. Phylogenetic tree showing inferred evolutionary relationships of viruses in different genera in the family Caulimoviridae . Polymerase gene sequences of exemplar virus isolates of each of the species, homologous to nucleotide positions 4449–5648 of cauliflower mosaic virus ( V00141 ) were aligned as conceptual amino acid sequences using PROMALS3D, guided by PDB protein structural files 3S8I_A, 4Z2Z_A, 4OL8_E and 4MH8_A. Corresponding DNA sequence alignments were then generated using TRANALIGN. A maximum likelihood estimate of phylogeny was done MEGA7 using using the GTR+G+I model ( Kumar et al., 2016 ). Branches supported by >70% of 100 bootstrap replicates are indicated. Saccharomyces cerevisiae Ty3 virus (genus Metavirus, family Metaviridae ), was used as an outgroup. Colored dots indicate genera, with open circles indicating unclassified viruses in a genus. This phylogenetic tree and corresponding sequence alignment are available to download from the Resources page .
